description: Staff app (apps/mobile-staff): build the shared animation/UI foundation that gives the app a polished, web-app-quality feel. This feature creates/upgrades reusable animated primitives and wires app-wide motion using the already-installed libraries (react-native-reanimated 4.1, react-native-gesture-handler 2.28, react-native-worklets). It fixes the missing GestureHandlerRootView root wrapper and standardizes navigation/tab transitions. No new dependencies. This is a prerequisite for FEAT-003.
steps: Fix root gesture setup: in app/_layout.tsx wrap the returned tree in `GestureHandlerRootView` (from react-native-gesture-handler) with style flex:1. Currently SlideToConfirm uses GestureDetector but no root wrapper exists, so gestures can silently fail on Android. Keep existing OfflineBanner, StatusBar, Stack.

Add consistent stack transitions in app/_layout.tsx Stack screenOptions: set a default `animation` (e.g. 'slide_from_right') and keep the alert screens on 'slide_from_bottom'/fullScreenModal. Ensure `animation` values are valid for expo-router/react-native-screens.

Create src/components/AnimatedPressable.tsx: a Reanimated-powered pressable that scales down (~0.96) with a spring on pressIn and back on pressOut, preserves onPress, accessibility props, and existing Vibration feedback pattern. Export it and respect reduced motion (skip scale when unavailable).
Upgrade src/components/Button.tsx to use the press-scale animation (either compose AnimatedPressable or add the same Reanimated scale) while keeping its current variants/sizes/API unchanged.

Create src/components/AnimatedScreen.tsx: a wrapper that plays a subtle entrance (fade + translateY) on mount using Reanimated, for use as the outermost container of screens. Keep it lightweight and safe with ScrollView/FlatList children.

Generalize src/components/AnimatedFadeIn.tsx usage helper for staggered lists (it already exists) and ensure it is exported from a components index if one is used; confirm FadeInDown stagger works with an `index` prop.

Upgrade src/components/ui/Shimmer.tsx to a moving gradient sweep (translateX loop) instead of opacity-only, add dark-mode-friendly base colors, and keep the existing skeleton exports (ProductCardSkeleton, OrderRowSkeleton, StatCardSkeleton, ListItemSkeleton) working.

Add animated tab bars: in app/(admin)/_layout.tsx, app/(delivery)/_layout.tsx, app/(packing)/_layout.tsx give the active tab icon a subtle scale/opacity animation (a small AnimatedTabIcon component is fine) and align active tint with the emerald primary token (#10b981 / primary-500). Keep emoji or swap to a consistent icon approach, but do not add new icon libraries.

Standardize the accent color: prefer the tailwind `primary` (emerald) tokens and the emerald hex used elsewhere; avoid mixing #059669 and #10b981 arbitrarily. Centralize any hardcoded accent hex into src/config or a small theme constant if practical.
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint` in apps/mobile-staff and fix any errors introduced.
acceptance_criteria: app/_layout.tsx wraps the app in GestureHandlerRootView (flex:1) and defines a default Stack screen animation while keeping alert screens as bottom-sheet/fullScreenModal.

New primitives exist and compile: src/components/AnimatedPressable.tsx and src/components/AnimatedScreen.tsx; Button.tsx has press-scale feedback; Shimmer.tsx uses a gradient sweep with dark-friendly colors.
All three tab layouts show an animated active tab indicator/icon and use the emerald primary accent consistently.
`npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint` pass in apps/mobile-staff (no new errors vs FEAT-001 baseline).

findings.summary: Built the shared animation/UI foundation for apps/mobile-staff using only already-installed libs (react-native-reanimated 4.1, react-native-gesture-handler 2.28, react-native-svg 15.12.1 which is a declared staff dependency). No new dependencies added; React stays 19.1.0.
findings.root_layout: app/_layout.tsx now wraps the tree in GestureHandlerRootView (style flex:1) replacing the plain View, fixing the missing root gesture wrapper that SlideToConfirm's GestureDetector relies on (Android). Added a default Stack screen animation 'slide_from_right' while keeping both alert screens on presentation:'fullScreenModal' + animation:'slide_from_bottom'. StatusBar and OfflineBanner preserved.
findings.animated_pressable: New src/components/AnimatedPressable.tsx: Animated.createAnimatedComponent(Pressable) with press-scale 0.96 spring on pressIn/out, preserves onPress/accessibility/children, keeps Vibration.vibrate(8) haptic (toggleable via haptic prop), and skips scaling when useReducedMotion() is true. forwardRef supported.
findings.button: src/components/Button.tsx upgraded: wrapped its existing NativeWind Pressable in an Animated.View that scales to 0.96 on press (spring), so all className styling / variants / sizes / API are unchanged. Respects reduced motion. Kept Vibration.vibrate(8).
findings.animated_screen: New src/components/AnimatedScreen.tsx: subtle mount entrance (fade + translateY 12px, Easing.out cubic 350ms) on a plain Animated.View (className 'flex-1' default) so ScrollView/FlatList children are safe. Renders instantly with no transform under reduced motion.
findings.animated_fade_in: src/components/AnimatedFadeIn.tsx already supports the `index` prop for FadeInDown stagger; left as-is (works). No top-level src/components barrel exists (imports are direct '@/components/X'), so no new barrel created to avoid changing import conventions.
findings.shimmer: src/components/ui/Shimmer.tsx rebuilt: moving gradient sweep via a translateX loop (withRepeat linear 1200ms) over an SVG LinearGradient (transparent->highlight->transparent) instead of opacity pulse. Light/dark-friendly base+highlight colors chosen via useColorScheme. Measures width with onLayout; falls back to static base fill before measure or under reduced motion. All four skeleton exports (ProductCardSkeleton, OrderRowSkeleton, StatCardSkeleton, ListItemSkeleton) preserved and given dark: border/bg variants.
findings.tab_bars: New src/components/AnimatedTabIcon.tsx animates active tab emoji (scale 1.15 spring + opacity fade), reduced-motion aware. Wired into app/(admin), app/(delivery), app/(packing) _layout.tsx. All three now use ACTIVE_TINT (#10b981 primary-500) and INACTIVE_TINT (#94a3b8); the packing layout's old purple #7c3aed active tint was standardized to emerald. No new icon libraries.
findings.accent_standardization: New src/config/theme.ts centralizes accent hexes (primary #10b981, primaryDark #059669, primaryLight #34d399, muted #94a3b8) and exports ACTIVE_TINT/INACTIVE_TINT used by the tab layouts, so active tint is consistently emerald primary-500 rather than mixing #059669/#10b981/#7c3aed.
findings.verification: cd apps/mobile-staff && npx tsc --noEmit => exit 2 with EXACTLY the one pre-existing baseline error src/services/notifications.ts(7,35) TS2322. No new tsc errors introduced by this feature. Staff `npm run lint` intentionally skipped: per FEAT-001 baseline apps/mobile-staff has no ESLint flat config and doesn't depend on eslint, so lint is not runnable (pre-existing setup gap, not a regression). No device/EAS build available in sandbox (static verification only).
findings.deviations: Used react-native-svg (already installed + declared in apps/mobile-staff/package.json at 15.12.1) for the true gradient sweep since expo-linear-gradient is not installed; this adds no new dependency. Button press-scale implemented by wrapping the existing Pressable in an Animated.View (rather than swapping to AnimatedPressable) to guarantee NativeWind className interop and an unchanged public API.
